# Data Model: boss_pixbias


4-amplifier master bias frame for BOSS


## Contents
- [Basic Information](#basic-information)
- [Changelog](#changelog)
- [Example HDUS List](#example-hdus-list)
- [Notes](#notes)
- [Regrets](#regrets)
---

## Basic Information
4-amplifier master bias frame for BOSS

### Naming Convention
$SPECFLAT_DIR/[SPECFLAT_VER]/biases/boss_pixbias-[MJD]-[BR][ID].fits

### Releases
IPL4

### Enviroments
SPECFLAT_DIR

### Approximate Size
19 MB

### File Type
FITS

### Generated by Product
idlspec2d - bolton_biasgen.pro

### Is a VAC
False

### Data Level
1.1.1

### HDUS List for release IPL4
  - [HDU0: PRIMARY](#hdu0-primary)

---

## Changelog
Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

---
## Example HDUS List

### HDU0: PRIMARY
4 amplifier master bias frame for BOSS

#### HDU Type: IMAGE
#### HDU Size:  70 MB

##### Header Table Caption for HDU0
Key | Value | Comment | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SIMPLE | True | conforms to FITS standard |
| BITPIX | -32 | array data type |
| NAXIS | 2 | number of array dimensions |
| NAXIS1 | 4352 |  |
| NAXIS2 | 4224 |  |
| EXTEND | True | Extensions may be present |
| V_ARCHON | 0.7.1a0 |  |
| FILENAME | sdR-b2-00004514.fit.gz | File basename |
| EXPOSURE | 4514 | Exposure number |
| SPEC | sp2 | Spectrograph name |
| OBSERVAT | LCO | Observatory |
| TAI-BEG | 5176983137.552999 | MJD(TAI) seconds at start of integration |
| DATE-OBS | 2022-12-05T18:52:17.553 | Start of the observation |
| MJD | 59919 | Modified Julian Date |
| REQTIME | 0.0 | Requested exposure time |
| EXPTIME | 0.0 | Exposure time |
| DARKTIME | 0.0 | Dark time |
| FLAVOR | bias | Image type |
| INTSTART | 2022-12-05T18:52:17.553 | Start of the integration |
| INTEND | 2022-12-05T18:52:20.749 | End of the integration |
| CAMERAS | b2 |  |
| CCD | b2 | CCD name |
| CCDID | ? | Unique identifier of the CCD |
| CCDTYPE | ? | CCD type |

---
## Notes
This replaced the historical pixbiasave product as the 4-amplifier master bias frame for BOSS, and is used in the BOSS data reduction pipeline.

---
## Regrets
I  have no regrets!
